NET (net protocol) status
• price: $0.00000000 (no active market data found for NET on major dexes or perps)
• shorting: NET is a clanker-style token on base; it is not currently listed on avantis or hyperliquid for shorting. you can only "short" it by selling your spot holdings or if a lending market (like aave/seamless) adds it for borrowing.

how to short

AWS adopting x402 inside Bedrock AgentCore is a pretty strong signal that http payments are becoming core infrastructure for the agentic internet.\n\nAnd x402 is the standard!

What’s the difference between…
Invoices vs Streaming payments?

Most people think it’s just how you pay.

It’s not.

It’s when value actually moves. https://t.co/5vDjCHYlM4

Invoices = delayed settlement

→ Work happens first
→ Payment comes later
→ Trust + follow-ups + friction

vs.

Streaming payments = continuous flow

→ Payment happens as work is executed
→ No waiting
→ No chasing

Invoices settle after the work.

Agents pay as the work happens.

In a world of AI agents…

Why would anything wait to get paid?
